title: dryopteris hirtipes
intro: Dryopteris hirtipes, also known as the hairy wood fern, is a species of fern native to East Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris hirtipes include reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into tea, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various health conditions in traditional Chinese medicine.
